Source   Edit  

EC4X Engine Logging System

Lightweight, structured logging with compile-time filtering Usage: import common/logger logDebug("Combat", "Resolving space combat in system", systemId) logInfo("Economy", "Income phase complete", income = 1500) logWarn("Fleet", "Fleet has no destination", fleetId) logError("Resolve", "Invalid order", error = errorMsg)

Compile with log level control: nim c -d:logLevel=DEBUG # Show all logs nim c -d:logLevel=INFO # Show INFO, WARN, ERROR (default) nim c -d:logLevel=WARN # Show WARN, ERROR only nim c -d:logLevel=ERROR # Show ERROR only nim c -d:release # Disables DEBUG logs automatically

Types

LogLevel {.pure.} = enum
  DEBUG = 0, INFO = 1, WARN = 2, ERROR = 3
Source   Edit  

Consts

CompileLogLevel = LogLevel.DEBUG
Source   Edit  

Procs

proc log(level: LogLevel; module: string; message: string; details: string = "") {.
    ...raises: [IOError], tags: [TimeEffect, WriteIOEffect], forbids: [].}
Core logging function - use log* templates instead (they handle compile-time filtering) Source   Edit  

Templates

template logCombat(message: string; details: varargs[string, `$`])
Source   Edit   
template logDebug(module: string; message: string; details: varargs[string, `$`])
Debug log - filtered out in release builds Source   Edit   
template logEconomy(message: string; details: varargs[string, `$`])
Source   Edit   
template logError(module: string; message: string; details: varargs[string, `$`])
Error log - critical issues Source   Edit   
template logFleet(message: string; details: varargs[string, `$`])
Source   Edit   
template logInfo(module: string; message: string; details: varargs[string, `$`])
Info log - normal operational messages Source   Edit   
template logPerf(module: string; message: string; details: varargs[string, `$`])
Source   Edit   
template logResolve(message: string; details: varargs[string, `$`])
Source   Edit   
template logRNG(message: string; details: varargs[string, `$`])
Source   Edit   
template logTable(message: string; details: varargs[string, `$`])
Table operation logging (for debugging table issues) Source   Edit   
template logWarn(module: string; message: string; details: varargs[string, `$`])
Warning log - potential issues Source   Edit
